# FlowChain RPC Reference

Generated by `npm run flowchain:dev-pack:e2e` from live `rpc_discover` output.

- RPC path: `/rpc`
- Chain id: `flowmemory-local-devnet-v0`
- Deployment mode: `local-only`
- Completion gate passed: `false`
- Public RPC gate passed: `false`

| Method | Category | Mode | Public eligible |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `account_get` | wallet | read | true |
| `account_list` | wallet | read | true |
